allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: 移除 Zeabur 配置文件，准备 Vercel 部署 *)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'D:\\桌面\\ielts-web\\backend'; Write-Host '正在启动后端服务...' -ForegroundColor Green; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload")

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'D:\\桌面\\ielts-web\\backend'; Write-Host '=== IELTS 后端服务 ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '提示：首次上传 PDF 会下载 OCR 模型（约 5-10 分钟）' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '请耐心等待下载完成，不要中断' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host ''; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'D:\\桌面\\ielts-web\\frontend'; Write-Host '=== IELTS 前端服务 ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ''; npm run dev")
